title: Assault on Lwhekk

{{Quote|He created the Empire of the Hand. He crushed the Ssi-ruuvi Imperium before it could attack our civilization in force. And I have no doubt that he encountered and destroyed enemies whose secrets he took to his grave.|[[Lenang O'Pali/Legends|Lenang O'Pali]], in the publication ''[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo Reconsidered: A Patriot's Perspective]]''|<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>}}
A '''battle''' was fought around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] between the [[Empire of the Hand]] and [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] with the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] at [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]], capital of the Imperium.

At the time the [[Ssi-ruuvi invasions|Ssi-Ruuvi invasion]] of the larger [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] was taking place, they were also launching preliminary attacks against their distant neighbor in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]. The [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] did not take kindly to their citizens being [[Entechment|enteched]], and so slightly after the [[Invasion of Bakura]], the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]] launched a massive raid against Lwhekk, destroying a good deal of Ssi-ruuvi ships and shipyards.

Just after the Chiss departed from their punitive raid, a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force led by the recently renovated [[Sibwarra|''Shriwirr'']] (renamed ''Sibwarra'' by the New Republic) arrived. They took note of the large-scale damage, and attempted to negotiate a truce with the Ssi-ruuk. When that proved futile, the New Republic Fleet engaged in another punitive battle against the already-weakened Lwhekk, then departed on [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] orders to aid in the liberation of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. The [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] believed that [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ivpikkis]] commanded the Ssi-ruuvi forces in that engagement.

It would be many years until Lwhekk fully recovered from the attacks.
